name: python3-pygit2
title: python3-pygit2
description:
Python bindings for libgit2 (Python 3 module)
The Pygit2 module provides a set of Python bindings to the libgit2 shared
library. libgit2 implements the core of Git. Pygit2 works with CPython
and pypy.
.
This package contains the Python 3 module.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-pygit2 because Python bindings for libgit2 (Python 3 module).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-pygit2 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-pygit2 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-pygit2 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
